common.ia_trained: AI trained for the real estate market · Domvia

chat.title: Conversational AI
chat.subtitle: Real estate specialist available 24/7
chat.welcome:
Hello! I am Domvia's AI, a specialist in the real estate market. 🏠

I can help you with:
• **Financing simulation** (FGTS, SAC, Price, subsidies)
• **Questions about buying, selling, or renting**
• **Documentation and fee calculation** (ITBI, deed, registration)
• **Home program information**
• **Capture and negotiation strategies**

Tell me: how can I help you today?
quick_prompts: How much deed tax will I pay on a $ 600,000 property?
How does the home subsidy work?
What documentation is needed to buy a property?
Difference between SAC and Price in financing
How to calculate the rental value of a property?

hub.subtitle: Create, review, sign and share professional real estate documents — right from your phone

recibo-chaves.name: Key Handover Receipt
recibo-chaves.desc: Proves the delivery of keys in rentals, sales, or returns.

recibo-sinal.name: Business Signal Receipt
recibo-sinal.desc: Confirms receipt of signal for reservation or start of negotiation.

recibo-pagamento.name: Payment Receipt
recibo-pagamento.desc: Confirms receipt of any value related to property.

proposta-compra.name: Property Purchase Proposal
proposta-compra.desc: Formalizes an acquisition proposal with value, conditions, and term.

autorizacao-visita.name: Visit Authorization
autorizacao-visita.desc: Authorizes the broker to carry out visits with potential buyers.

ai_gen.title: Generate with AI
ai_gen.subtitle: Describe the document and the AI creates it automatically
ai_gen.prompt_label: Describe the document in natural language
ai_gen.prompt_placeholder:
Examples:
• "Generate a $15,000 sign-over receipt for the purchase of apt 302. Buyer: John Doe, ID 000.000.000-00. Today's date."
• "Visit authorization for the property at 100 Flowers St, for client Mary Smith today at 2 PM"
• "Rent payment receipt for March, value $1,800, paid by John Smith, property Street A, 50"
ai_gen.success_subtitle: The document is in the preview side. Review and, if necessary, make corrections.
ai_gen.refine_subtitle: State what you want to correct and the AI will generate a new version.
ai_gen.refine_placeholder:
Observation examples:
• Correct the value to $12,000
• Include two witnesses
• Change date to 03/15/2025
• Add a clause that the sign-over will be deducted from the total
